title: Vox token file (vox.tokens.json)
description: Schema for vox.tokens.json. Each color value is either a plain hex string or an annotated object with optional WCAG contrast-pair metadata. Unknown token references in .vox source are compile errors; raw color literals on color properties are warnings.

color.description: Color tokens. Values are hex strings or annotated color objects. Keys become CSS custom properties: color.primary → --vox-color-primary.

spacing.description: Spacing tokens. Values are CSS length strings (e.g. '8px', '0.5rem'). Keys become CSS custom properties: spacing.md → --vox-spacing-md.

font.description: Font size tokens. Values are CSS size strings. Keys become CSS custom properties: font.base → --vox-font-base.

on.description: Dot-separated token path of the background this foreground sits on (e.g. 'color.background'). Triggers WCAG 2.1 contrast validation at token-load time.

text_role.description: WCAG contrast threshold. 'body' requires ≥4.5:1 (warn) / ≥3:1 (error). 'large' and 'ui' require ≥3:1 (warn/error).

oneOf.description: Annotated color token with optional WCAG contrast-pair metadata.
